title: DARENYI Flower Vase 9.4 Inch Glass Vases for Flowers Home Table Centerpiece Grey Vase for Living Room, Wedding, Dinner, Table, Office, Bedroom (Grey)
features: Size: Glass vase with a height of 24cm/9.4 inch and a diameter of 10cm/3.9 inch. You can add fresh flowers, dried flowers, branches, water, stones, or other fillers to the vase to make it a beautiful decoration on the table.

Thick Glass: This flower vase is made of high-quality handmade glass material, with a thick bottom that is sturdy and durable. It has a stable center of gravity and is not easy to fall off. The polished edges make this vases delicate and smooth.

Ribbed Design: This vases for flowers features a unique ribbed design that is both fashionable and elegant. It is an ideal choice for home decor, weddings, restaurants, and offices, and its elegant appearance enhances the beauty of any environment.

Modern Style: The glass vase adopts a modern and minimalist design style, with exquisite handmade craftsmanship. The simple and unique vase is a beautiful scenery line. When placed at home, it gives a warm and cozy feeling, decorating different scenes and showcasing your taste.

Multiple Applications: Flower vase have multiple applications and can be used as great artistic decorations in living rooms, bedrooms, dining rooms, kitchens, offices, and dining table centers. This vase for flowers is also suitable as a gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, housewarming, weddings, and anniversaries.
description: Product Description DARENYI Glass Vase Flower Vase Tall Ribbed Vase for Modern Home Decorative The retro ribbed design adds a touch of elegance and aesthetic appeal, and the unique appearance design of the vase can also be used for personal decoration and modern art decoration. Vases are perfect for holding fresh flowers, dried flowers, branches, green leaves, or other mini decorations. The bottom is filled with water to keep them vibrant and beautiful Flower vase is an exquisite gift for friends and family, perfect for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, birthdays, Christmas, birthdays, household items, and more. It is an excellent choice for modern home decoration, restaurant decoration, and neutral home decoration.
